title: Lets honor Earth Day together on monday mansion
excerpt: No matter where in the world, Earth Day is a powerful reminder of the beautiful planet we call home. On April 18, we’re excited to invite you to the monday mansion for a special Earth Day event just for our community!  B…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
No matter where in the world, Earth Day is a powerful reminder of the beautiful planet we call home. On April 18, we’re excited to invite you to the monday mansion for a special Earth Day event just for our community! By signing up, you’ll﻿﻿
﻿
Engage with like-minded individuals and experience the synergy of our community coming together

Get inspired and discover innovative ways to incorporate eco-friendly practices into your daily life and work.

Plant a virtual tree in the mansion’s forest (and we’ll plant a real tree in one of our monday forests).

And lots more!

Let’s celebrate Earth day together!
